bank_account_balance_snapshots.description: Graph node bank_account_balance_snapshots. Attributes: balance_snapshot_id (Simple balance record identifier.), account_id (Account being valued.), balance_date (Balance snapshot date.), currency_code (Balance currency.), opening_balance_amount (Opening balance amount.), closing_balance_amount (Closing balance amount.), available_balance_amount (Available balance after holds.), book_balance_amount (Book balance.), blocked_balance_amount (Blocked or reserved balance.), credit_turnover_amount (Credits in period.), debit_turnover_amount (Debits in period.), average_30d_balance_amount (30-day average balance.), balance_source (Synthetic balance source.), is_month_end_flag (Month-end balance indicator.)

service_products.description: Graph node service_products. Attributes: service_product_id (Simple product identifier.), product_family (Accounts, cards, loans, investments, FX, derivatives.), product_name (Product name.), product_type (Detailed product type.), default_currency_code (Default product currency.), risk_weight (Product risk weight for scoring exercises.), is_cash_like_flag (Whether product is cash-like.), is_tradeable_flag (Whether product supports investment_orders.), requires_suitability_flag (Whether product requires suitability check.), status (Product status.), start_date (SCD2 validity start date for this dimensional record.), end_date (SCD2 validity end date; blank means current record.)

money_movements.description: Graph node money_movements. Attributes: movement_id (Simple transaction identifier.), bank_relation_id (Related bank relation.), account_id (Primary account involved.), service_product_id (Product classification.), transaction_date (Date transaction was executed.), booking_date (Date transaction was booked.), value_date (Value date.), transaction_type (Wire, card, cash, transfer, fee, security settlement, FX.), direction (Incoming or outgoing.), amount (Original transaction amount.), currency_code (Original transaction currency.), amount_usd (USD equivalent for analytics.), counterparty_name (Displayed counterparty name.), counterparty_jurisdiction_id (Counterparty jurisdiction.), payment_channel (Online, branch, card, swift, internal, mobile.), payment_purpose (Purpose text.), transaction_status (Posted, pending, rejected, reversed.), is_cash_flag (Cash transaction indicator.), is_cross_border_flag (Cross-border transaction indicator.), risk_score (Transaction risk score.), narrative_text (Free-text narrative for NLP.)

ledger_entries.description: Graph node ledger_entries. Attributes: ledger_entry_id (Simple ledger booking identifier.), movement_id (Transaction that generated this booking.), account_id (Booked account.), booking_date (Date of booking line.), value_date (Value date of booking line.), debit_credit_indicator (Debit or credit.), booking_amount (Booking line amount.), booking_currency_code (Booking currency.), balance_after_booking_amount (Balance after booking.), booking_type (Principal, fee, tax, interest, reversal, correction.), fee_amount (Fee amount associated with booking.), tax_amount (Tax amount associated with booking.), booking_status (Posted, pending, reversed.), reversal_ledger_entry_id (Original booking if this is a reversal.), booking_description (Booking narrative.)

outside_parties.description: Graph node outside_parties. Attributes: outside_party_id (Simple external party identifier.), movement_id (Transaction where the external party appears.), jurisdiction_id (Jurisdiction of external party.), external_party_role (Originator, beneficiary, intermediary, correspondent, merchant.), external_party_name (Synthetic external party name.), external_party_type (Individual, company, bank, merchant, government.), bank_name (Bank name if relevant.), bank_jurisdiction_id (Bank jurisdiction.), account_number_masked (Masked external account number.), address_city (External party city.), is_known_counterparty_flag (Whether counterparty is known from history.), screening_status (Not screened, clear, potential hit, confirmed hit.), risk_score (External party risk score.), notes (Short note.), start_date (SCD2 validity start date for this dimensional record.), end_date (SCD2 validity end date; blank means current record.)

investment_orders.description: Graph node investment_orders. Attributes: investment_order_id (Simple trade identifier.), account_id (Trading or custody account.), bank_relation_id (Related bank relation.), client_id (Client placing or benefiting from trade.), service_product_id (Product traded.), trade_date (Trade execution date.), settlement_date (Settlement date.), instrument_id (Synthetic instrument identifier.), instrument_name (Instrument display name.), instrument_type (Equity, bond, fund, FX, option, future, structured product.), buy_sell_indicator (Buy or sell.), quantity (Traded quantity.), price_amount (Trade price.), trade_amount (Gross trade amount.), currency_code (Trade currency.), broker_name (Executing broker.), trade_status (Booked, settled, cancelled, failed.), suitability_result (Suitable, not suitable, not assessed.)

monitoring_alerts.description: Graph node monitoring_alerts. Attributes: monitoring_alert_id (Simple AML alert identifier.), bank_relation_id (Related bank relation.), client_id (Related client.), account_id (Related account.), movement_id (Triggered transaction if applicable.), alert_date (Date alert was generated.), scenario_code (Monitoring scenario code.), scenario_name (Scenario description.), alert_score (Alert score.), alert_severity (Low, medium, high, critical.), alert_status (New, assigned, investigation, closed, escalated.), assigned_staff_id (Alert owner.), closed_date (Closure date.), closure_reason (Reason for closure.), typology (Synthetic typology label.), narrative_summary (Short alert narrative.)

monitoring_signals.description: Graph node monitoring_signals. Attributes: monitoring_signal_id (Simple signal identifier.), monitoring_alert_id (Alert explained by this signal.), movement_id (Transaction contributing to the signal.), signal_name (Signal name.), signal_value (Observed value.), threshold_value (Threshold used by scenario.), score_contribution (Points contributed to alert score.), signal_date (Date signal was evaluated.), is_rule_breached_flag (Whether signal breached the threshold.), explanation_text (Human-readable explanation.)

review_cases.description: Graph node review_cases. Attributes: review_case_id (Simple investigation case identifier.), monitoring_alert_id (Source alert if opened from alert.), bank_relation_id (Case relationship.), client_id (Main client in case.), case_open_date (Date case was opened.), case_due_date (Target completion date.), case_close_date (Date case was closed.), case_type (AML, sanctions, fraud, tax, KYC, referral.), case_priority (Low, medium, high, urgent.), case_status (Open, pending info, escalated, closed.), assigned_investigator_staff_id (Assigned investigator.), decision (No issue, monitor, escalate, file report, exit.), decision_reason (Reason for decision.), reported_to_authority_flag (Whether case resulted in regulatory report.), quality_review_status (Not required, pending, passed, failed.), case_summary (Investigation summary.)

review_evidence.description: Graph node review_evidence. Attributes: review_evidence_id (Simple evidence identifier.), review_case_id (Investigation case.), related_movement_id (Transaction evidence if applicable.), related_document_id (Document evidence if applicable.), evidence_type (Transaction, document, note, external search, screenshot, communication.), evidence_title (Short title.), evidence_date (Date evidence was captured.), collected_by_staff_id (Staff who collected evidence.), source_channel (System, email, client call, branch, open web.), evidence_summary (Short evidence summary.), confidentiality_level (Public, internal, restricted, confidential.), is_key_evidence_flag (Whether evidence is key to decision.)

interaction_notes.description: Graph node interaction_notes. Attributes: interaction_note_id (Simple note identifier.), bank_relation_id (Related bank relation.), client_id (Related client.), account_id (Related account.), review_case_id (Related investigation case.), created_by_staff_id (Author of the note.), note_date (Date note was written.), note_type (Call, meeting, KYC, investigation, service, complaint.), note_text (Synthetic free-text note for NLP exercises.), sentiment_label (Positive, neutral, negative or mixed.), contains_sensitive_info_flag (Synthetic sensitive information indicator.), follow_up_required_flag (Whether a follow-up is needed.), follow_up_due_date (Due date for follow-up.), visibility_level (Team, relationship, compliance, restricted.)

due_diligence_reviews.description: Graph node due_diligence_reviews. Attributes: due_diligence_review_id (Simple KYC review identifier.), bank_relation_id (Bank relation under review.), lead_client_id (Lead client for review.), review_type (Periodic, event-driven, onboarding, remediation.), review_start_date (Review start date.), review_due_date (Review due date.), review_completion_date (Completion date.), review_status (Not started, in progress, pending client, complete, overdue.), reviewer_staff_id (Reviewer assigned.), old_risk_band (Risk band before review.), new_risk_band (Risk band after review.), risk_change_reason (Reason for risk change.), documents_missing_count (Number of missing documents.), client_contacted_flag (Whether client was contacted.), decision (Continue, restrict, exit, enhanced monitoring.)

fx_rates.description: Graph node fx_rates. Attributes: fx_rate_id (Simple FX rate identifier.), rate_date (Rate date.), base_currency_code (Base currency.), quote_currency_code (Quote currency.), spot_rate (Spot FX rate.), average_rate (Average rate for reporting.), rate_source (Synthetic source label.), is_month_end_rate_flag (Month-end rate indicator.)

screening_matches.description: Graph node screening_matches. Attributes: screening_match_id (Simple sanctions hit identifier.), client_id (Matched client if applicable.), outside_party_id (Matched external party if applicable.), monitoring_alert_id (Related alert if generated.), screening_date (Date screened.), watchlist_name (Synthetic list name.), matched_name (Matched name.), match_score (Fuzzy match score 0-100.), hit_status (Open, false positive, true match, escalated.), reviewed_by_staff_id (Reviewer.), review_date (Review date.), resolution_note (Resolution narrative.)

risk_timeline.description: Graph node risk_timeline. Attributes: risk_timeline_id (Simple risk score history identifier.), client_id (Client scored.), bank_relation_id (Bank relation scored.), score_date (Score date.), score_type (Onboarding, periodic, transaction, model, override.), risk_score (Risk score.), risk_band (Risk band.), risk_driver_1 (Top driver.), risk_driver_2 (Second driver.), risk_driver_3 (Third driver.), model_version (Synthetic model version.), override_reason (Manual override reason if any.)

outreach_events.description: Graph node outreach_events. Attributes: communication_id (Simple communication identifier.), bank_relation_id (Related bank relation.), client_id (Related client.), staff_id (Staff involved.), communication_date (Date of communication.), communication_channel (Phone, email, meeting, secure message, letter.), communication_topic (Topic label.), communication_outcome (Outcome.), duration_minutes (Duration.), follow_up_required_flag (Follow-up needed.), related_interaction_note_id (Linked note.)

client_permissions.description: Graph node client_permissions. Attributes: client_permission_id (Simple consent identifier.), client_id (Client granting consent.), bank_relation_id (Related relationship.), consent_type (Marketing, data sharing, digital communication, profiling, research.), consent_status (Granted, withdrawn, expired, pending.), consent_start_date (Start date.), consent_end_date (End date.), capture_channel (Branch, online, call center, paper.), captured_by_staff_id (Staff who captured consent.), evidence_reference (Synthetic evidence reference.), start_date (SCD2 validity start date for this dimensional record.), end_date (SCD2 validity end date; blank means current record.)
